stat.title: Rally Killers
stat.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

notableEvents.label: Esmerlyn Valdez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Esmerlyn Valdez grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper. Jake Mangum out at 3rd. Esmerlyn Valdez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Randy Arozarena out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.
